statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); time=$(date +%H:%M); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); rel_dir=$(echo "$current_dir" | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); if [ ${#rel_dir} -gt 30 ]; then rel_dir="…/$(basename "$rel_dir")"; fi; git_info=""; if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); status=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$status" ]; then git_info=" 🌱$branch*"; else git_info=" 🌱$branch"; fi; fi; printf "[%s] %s@%s %s%s" "$time" "$user" "$host" "$rel_dir" "$git_info"
